positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical cosmic mandala illustration centered on a crescent moon and entwined starlight patterns. The composition features vibrant nebula hues (deep sapphire, rich violet, cyan) contrasting sharply with metallic gold filigree and deep black voids. Elements include constellations, stylized celestial bodies, and flowing cosmic dust rendered in a flat, graphic, linocut style mixed with ethereal digital painting. The artwork must have perfect symmetry and strong, clean silhouettes suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Highly intricate linework, volumetric light, glowing elements, clean edges, centralized composition.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, text, signature, logo, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, low resolution, photorealistic, 3d render, messy, asymmetrical
